summary: Full e2e testing for Stori & Co. landing page. Backend pytest (4/4) and Playwright UI tests (all critical flows) passed: sections rendering, 4 service cards, CTA scroll to #contact, footer Instagram link, reveal animations (16/16), error toast on missing fields, successful form submission with shadcn Select + Checkbox -> POST /api/contact -> SIGNAL RECEIVED block, mobile 390px responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it's referenced in the /contact except block (line 96 uses logger before line 125 logging setup runs at import). Currently no error reached because tests pass, but a true exception path would NameError. Move logging.basicConfig + logger=... above route definitions.
server.py /api/contact returns 200 (FastAPI default for POST). Consider 201 Created for REST correctness — non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Inserted TEST_ prefixed contact submission(s) during tests; safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend healthy. All 12 features in the review request verified end-to-end via Playwright at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. shadcn Select option testid pattern is `form-revenue-option-<exact value with em-dash U+2014>`. Toast lib is sonner, queried via [data-sonner-toast].
